case_title: DOUGLAS PARKING LLC VS. MONOGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTA REIT, LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,621.31 FILED BY DOUGLAS PARKING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MONOGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTA REIT, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR: MATT DUNCAN, DIR, OF FACILITIES MANAGEMENT; AUTHORIZED PERSON TO APPEAR FOR DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT MONOGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTA REIT, LLC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS PARKING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MONOGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTA REIT, LLC
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV. 4, 2016 AT 8:30AM (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MONOGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTA REIT, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-22-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MONOGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTA REIT, LLC
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR BY STEVEN DOUGLAS ('MEMBER' OF CORP.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS PARKING LLC
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,857.00 FILED BY MONOGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTA REIT, LLC AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DOUGLAS PARKING LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS PARKING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONOGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTA REIT, LLC $3,621.31 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,686.31 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MONOGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTA REIT, LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DOUGLAS PARKING LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2016 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO NOV-04-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS PARKING, LLC'S REPRESENTATIVE STEVEN DOUGLAS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MONGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTA REIT, LLC'S REPRESENTATIVE MATT DUNCAN. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM TO NOV-04-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS PARKING LLC'S REPRESENTATIVE STEVEN DOUGLAS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MONOGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTIA REIT, LLC'S REPRESENTATIVE MATT DUNCUN. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS PARKING LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MONOGRAM RESIDENTIAL ARGENTA REIT, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY STEVEN DOUGLAS, OWNER, AND WAIVES SERVICE ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MATT DUNCAN, DIRECTOR OF ANCILLARY SERVICES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2016 - JUDGMENT.
